name: HUNDUN
short_description: The game has a moderate difficulty level, allowing players to mindlessly shoot and enjoy smooth gameplay, or to use their brains to solve puzzles and defeat various monsters, making it very relaxing.
detailed_description:
You are the night watch at Station 7. Simple job: watch the screens. Kill the bad channels.

But tonight the TVs are watching back. Tubes in the walls. Voices from the ceiling. You pull the plug. The picture stays. Cut the power. The noise gets louder.

The signal doesn't want to be understood.

It wants to be watched.

Until you become part of the picture.

You are the watch. The TVs are the enemy. Kill them—before they burn you into the frame.

Introduction to gameplay

  • A first-person shooter game with great feel

  • 3D shooting, platform jumping, adventure puzzle solving

  • Enter the complex maze and find the shortcut to pass the level

  • Explore the world map, a huge conspiracy is waiting for you to discover
